narrative_text: Deep in the Glowing Glade, a curious fox named Jasper has discovered a mysterious, shimmering lantern hanging from an ancient, mossy tree. As the forest begins to wake up, Jasper leans in close to see what secret the light is hiding.
branch_summary: Jasper the Fox finds a magical lantern in a glowing forest.
scene_description: A mystical forest glade at dawn, where the air is filled with floating pollen and soft golden light. The background features layers of silhouetted trees against a pale lavender sky, while the foreground is a lush, mossy floor of deep teals and vibrant emeralds. The lighting is focused on a central gnarled oak tree and the warm, amber glow of a magical lantern, creating a cozy yet mysterious atmosphere.

properties.color: burnt orange with creamy white chest fluff and charcoal-black paw stockings
properties.size: medium, about the height of a small bush
properties.texture: thick, silky fur with a very bushy, white-tipped tail
properties.pattern: solid orange with distinct white and black patches
properties.distinctive_features: a tiny, notched left ear and bright, intelligent amber eyes that reflect the lantern light

entities.pose: leaning forward on three paws, one front paw slightly lifted, head tilted with ears perked up

properties.color: deep mahogany bark with patches of neon green moss
properties.size: large, dominating the right side of the frame
properties.texture: rough, craggy bark with deep, twisting fissures
properties.pattern: swirling wood grain and speckled lichen
properties.distinctive_features: a thick, low-hanging branch that curves downward like a heavy arm

entities.pose: standing tall with branches reaching toward the top corners of the frame

properties.color: burnished bronze metal with a glowing honey-yellow glass pane
properties.size: small, hanging within reach of the fox
properties.texture: smooth metallic frame with slightly frosted glass
properties.pattern: intricate filigree star shapes cut into the metal top
properties.distinctive_features: emits a soft pulsing light and a few tiny golden sparkles that float nearby

entities.pose: suspended from a thin silver chain, swaying slightly

properties.color: pale violet caps with glowing turquoise spots
properties.size: very small, clustered in a group of three
properties.texture: rubbery and smooth with a slight bioluminescent sheen
properties.distinctive_features: they cast a faint blue light onto the mossy ground below them

entities.pose: sprouting upward from a patch of dark soil

error_exclusions.reason: There is only one fox character in the scene.
The tree is a static environment element.
